qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo as ID, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.d_ape_y_nom as TEXT FROM LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP, LIQ99_RECIBOS JOIN LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per INNER LIQ99_RECIBOS.oi_tot_liq_per, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo WHERE LIQ99_RECIBOS.oi_liquidacion_ddo={#INDOC:@oi_liquidacion_ddo} and LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo={#INDOC:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo as ID, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.d_ape_y_nom as TEXT FROM LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP, LIQ99_RECIBOS JOIN LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per INNER LIQ99_RECIBOS.oi_tot_liq_per, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo WHERE LIQ99_RECIBOS.oi_liquidacion_ddo={#INDOC:@oi_liquidacion_ddo} and LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo={#INDOC:@code} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo as ID, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.d_ape_y_nom as TEXT FROM LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP, LIQ99_RECIBOS JOIN LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per INNER LIQ99_RECIBOS.oi_tot_liq_per, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo WHERE LIQ99_RECIBOS.oi_liquidacion_ddo={#INDOC:@oi_liquidacion_ddo} ORDER BY ID asc')/ROWS/ROW
